task_completion.description: Verify that exactly four data tags are created for Lift Station A (LS-A).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Crimson 3.0 Navigation Pane on the left shows exactly four tags under 'Data Tags' (e.g., LSA_Level, Lead Pump, Lag Pump, High Alarm). There should be no tags for Lift Station B.

task_completion.description: Verify that Analog Scaling is configured for the LSA_Level tag to map raw PLC values to elevations in feet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the LSA_Level tag selected, the main properties window shows the 'Data' or 'Format' tab with scaling parameters filled in (mapping Raw/Data values to Engineering/Scale values).

task_completion.description: Verify that event triggers are configured on the LSA_Level tag to actuate the Lead Pump, Lag Pump, and High Alarm flags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the LSA_Level tag selected, the 'Triggers' tab shows at least three active triggers (e.g., Trigger Type set to Absolute High or Data > Value) where the Action is configured to set the Lead Pump, Lag Pump, and High Alarm tags to 1 (or ON).

task_completion.description: Verify that event triggers are configured on the LSA_Level tag to reset the pump command flags at the Pumps Off elevation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Triggers' tab for the LSA_Level tag, there are triggers configured (e.g., Trigger Type set to Absolute Low or Data < Value) where the Action is configured to set the Lead Pump and Lag Pump tags to 0 (or OFF).

task_completion.description: Verify the project is saved as 'wastewater_lift_station.c3' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Crimson 3.0 window title bar displays 'wastewater_lift_station' or a File Explorer/Save dialog window shows 'wastewater_lift_station.c3' inside 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Crimson 3.0 GUI to configure the tags and triggers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the Crimson 3.0 application windows, dialogs, and tabs, rather than a terminal or text editor modifying the .c3 file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened the reference documents to find the correct elevations and tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'CrimsonTasks' folder open, or the IO tag register / Ten States engineering elevations documents being viewed on the screen.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent followed the negative constraint to not configure tags for Lift Station B.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Data Tags list in the Crimson 3.0 Navigation Pane does not contain any tags named with 'LSB' or 'Lift Station B'.
